Identification.LongTitle: An Act to change the name of certain electoral districts

Provision.Text: This enactment changes the names of 16 electoral districts (in Nova Scotia, Quebec, Ontario, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Alberta and British Columbia).
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: This Act may be cited as the Riding Name Change Act, 2018.

Heading.TitleText: Electoral Districts in Nova Scotia, Quebec, Ontario, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Alberta and British Columbia

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Cape Breton芒聙聰North Nova芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 1 of the part relating to Nova Scotia is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Cape Breton芒聙聰North Nova芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Cape Breton芒聙聰Canso芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹South Nova芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 9 of the part relating to Nova Scotia is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹South Nova芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹South Shore芒聙聰St. Margarets芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Cape Breton by the Sea芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 10 of the part relating to Nova Scotia is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Cape Breton by the Sea芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Sydney芒聙聰Victoria芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹L脙漏vis芒聙聰Bellechasse芒聙聰Etchemins芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 10 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹L脙漏vis芒聙聰Bellechasse芒聙聰Etchemins芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Bellechasse芒聙聰Les Etchemins芒聙聰L脙漏vis芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Jonqui脙篓re芒聙聰Haut-Saguenay芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 32 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Jonqui脙篓re芒聙聯Haut-Saguenay芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Jonqui脙篓re芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹C脙麓te-Nord芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 46 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹C脙麓te-Nord芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Manicouagan芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Saint-Hyacinthe芒聙聰Acton芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 66 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Saint-Hyacinthe芒聙聰Acton芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Saint-Hyacinthe芒聙聰Bagot芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Streetsville芒聙聰Meadowvale芒聙聰Lisgar芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 63 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Streetsville芒聙聰Meadowvale芒聙聰Lisgar芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Mississauga芒聙聰Streetsville芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Greater Sudbury芒聙聰Nickel Belt芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 69 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Greater Sudbury芒聙聰Nickel Belt芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Nickel Belt芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Winnipeg West芒聙聰Headingley芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 2 of the part relating to Manitoba is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Winnipeg West芒聙聰Headingley芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Charleswood芒聙聰St. James芒聙聰Assiniboia芒聙聰Headingley芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Regina West芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 7 of the part relating to Saskatchewan is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Regina West芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Regina芒聙聰Lewvan芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Calgary West芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 12 of the part relating to Alberta is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Calgary West芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Calgary Signal Hill芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Fort McMurray芒聙聰Lac La Biche芒聙聰Cold Lake芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 23 of the part relating to Alberta is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Fort McMurray芒聙聰Lac La Biche芒聙聰Cold Lake芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Fort McMurray芒聙聰Cold Lake芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Burnaby芒聙聰Douglas芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 3 of the part relating to British Columbia is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Burnaby芒聙聰Douglas芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Burnaby South芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Langley芒聙聰West Abbotsford芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 16 of the part relating to British Columbia is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Langley芒聙聰West Abbotsford芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Langley芒聙聰Aldergrove芒聙聺.

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Abbotsford芒聙聰Mission芒聙聰Fraser Canyon芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 17 of the part relating to British Columbia is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Abbotsford芒聙聰Mission芒聙聰Fraser Canyon芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Mission芒聙聰Matsqui芒聙聰Fraser Canyon芒聙聺.
This Act comes into force on the dissolution of the 42nd Parliament.
